# Maryland Kids Code

Jurisdiction: United States - Maryland
Region: US-MD
Citation: Maryland Kids Code
Authority: Maryland General Assembly
Source URL: https://mgaleg.maryland.gov/mgawebsite/Legislation/Details/sb0571?ys=2024RS
Topics: children_data, notice_transparency, data_minimization, automated_decision_making, marketing_opt_out, accountability
Keywords: Maryland Kids Code, age appropriate design, children privacy, minor data

## Summary
Maryland age-appropriate-design law for covered online products likely to be accessed by children, focused on children's privacy and harmful data practices.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess whether services are likely to be accessed by children.
- Configure privacy-protective defaults and limit child data processing.
- Avoid design and data practices that conflict with children's best interests.
